/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -Wextra -Werror -D_POSIX_C_SOURCE=200809L CMakeFiles/protocol_converter.dir/protocol_converter/src/protocol_converter.c.o CMakeFiles/protocol_converter.dir/protocol_converter/src/payload_pdl.c.o CMakeFiles/protocol_converter.dir/protocol_converter/src/main.c.o -o ../../target/bin/protocol_converter  ../lib/libosal.a ../lib/libhal.a ../lib/libpdl.a ../lib/libcan_gateway_lib.a -lrt ../lib/libhal.a ../lib/libosal.a -lrt
